title: Board scoped text search & replace for items and subitems
excerpt: As a user of Monday I would like to be able to search across a board’s items and subitems for a text string I defined at start of search, and then be prompted on each found instance to replace it or not with a replacemen…

posts.author: LawrenceC (Lawrence Cleaver)
posts.cookedHtml:
As a user of Monday I would like to be able to search across a board’s items and subitems for a text string I defined at start of search, and then be prompted on each found instance to replace it or not with a replacement text string I defined at start of search. This is to help speed up board/item/subitem housekeeping where we can at times have many instances of a piece of text we need to refactor.

It is important for us that we do not need to rely on 3rd party apps for adding such basic functionality to or ecosystem.
